name: [YAOC2] Onboarding Router — First Contact Detection
_doc: Shared sub-workflow called by all channel ingress workflows before forwarding to the policy gateway. Checks yaoc2.user_profiles for the incoming user_id+channel pair. If not found, returns {action: 'onboard'} so the caller routes to the channel-specific onboarding workflow. If found, returns {action: 'proceed', profile} so the caller routes normally to the brain.

parameters.query: SELECT id, user_id, channel, display_name, role, tenant, onboarded_at, policy_set FROM yaoc2.user_profiles WHERE user_id = $1 AND channel = $2 LIMIT 1
